### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2 HTTP/1.1
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connect-Timeout-Ms: 180000
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto
Host: api2.cursor.sh
Traceparent: REDACTED
User-Agent: connect-es/1.6.1
X-Amzn-Trace-Id: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Checksum: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Client-Arch: x64
X-Cursor-Client-Device-Type: desktop
X-Cursor-Client-Os: win32
X-Cursor-Client-Type: ide
X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.11
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Timezone: REDACTED
X-Ghost-Mode: true
X-New-Onboarding-Completed: false
X-Request-Id: REDACTED
X-Session-Id: REDACTED

{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4843024894782521597
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nimport asyncio\nfrom collections.abc import Awaitable, Callable\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, ValidationError\n\nfrom mini_celery.backoff import BackoffPolicy\n\n\nclass TaskExecutionError(Exception):\n    def __init__(self, message: str, retryable: bool):\n        super().__init__(message)\n        self.retryable = retryable\n\n\nclass RetryableTaskError(TaskExecutionError):\n    def __init__(self, message: str):\n        super().__init__(message, retryable=True)\n\n\nclass FatalTaskError(TaskExecutionError):\n    def __init__(self, message: str):\n        super().__init__(message, retryable=False)\n\n\nclass JobCancelledError(TaskExecutionError):\n    def __init__(self, message: str = \"job canceled\"):\n        super().__init__(message, retryable=False)\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass TaskContext:\n    job_id: str\n    attempt: int\n    should_cancel: Callable[[], bool]\n\n    async def checkpoint(self) -> None:\n        if self.should_cancel():\n            raise JobCancelledError()\n        await asyncio.sleep(0)\n\n\nTaskHandler = Callable[[TaskContext, BaseModel], Awaitable[dict[str, Any] | None]]\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass TaskSpec:\n    name: str\n    payload_model: type[BaseModel]\n    handler: TaskHandler\n    backoff_policy: BackoffPolicy\n\n\nclass TaskRegistry:\n    def __init__(self) -> None:\n        self._tasks: dict[str, TaskSpec] = {}\n\n    def register(self, spec: TaskSpec) -> None:\n        if spec.name in self._tasks:\n            raise ValueError(f\"Task type already registered: {spec.name}\")\n        self._tasks[spec.name] = spec\n\n    def get(self, task_type: str) -> TaskSpec:\n        try:\n            return self._tasks[task_type]\n        except KeyError as exc:\n            raise FatalTaskError(f\"Unknown task type: {task_type}\") from exc\n\n    async def execute(\n        self,\n        task_type: str,\n        payload: dict[str, Any],\n        context: TaskContext,\n    ) -> dict[str, Any] | None:\n        spec = self.get(task_type)\n        try:\n            validated = spec.payload_model.model_validate(payload)\n        except ValidationError as exc:\n            raise FatalTaskError(f\"Invalid payload for {task_type}: {exc}\") from exc\n\n        return await spec.handler(context, validated)\n\n    def backoff_for(self, task_type: str) -> BackoffPolicy:\n        return self.get(task_type).backoff_policy\n\n    def names(self) -> list[str]:\n        return sorted(self._tasks.keys())\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "74b07d702dc985c7ba3b4b73584a160d4d7e20d3b7cd7485f1891c80f77def68",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },

        }
      ],

    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n\nfrom mini_celery.models import JobState\n\n\nclass InvalidTransition(ValueError):\n    pass\n\n\nALLOWED_TRANSITIONS: dict[JobState, set[JobState]] = {\n    JobState.QUEUED: {JobState.RUNNING, JobState.CANCELED},\n    JobState.RUNNING: {\n        JobState.SUCCEEDED,\n        JobState.FAILED,\n        JobState.CANCELED,\n        JobState.DEAD,\n        JobState.QUEUED,\n    },\n    JobState.FAILED: {JobState.QUEUED},\n    JobState.DEAD: {JobState.QUEUED},\n    JobState.SUCCEEDED: set(),\n    JobState.CANCELED: set(),\n}\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass Transition:\n    old: JobState\n    new: JobState\n\n\ndef can_transition(old: JobState, new: JobState) -> bool:\n    return new in ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS.get(old, set())\n\n\ndef assert_transition(old: JobState, new: JobState) -> None:\n    if not can_transition(old, new):\n        raise InvalidTransition(f\"Invalid transition: {old} -> {new}\")\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "ff810ee4f83244f1cf789694704b84c8a368e47616eb132278c054d28fafae2d",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom collections.abc import Mapping\n\nfrom redis.asyncio import Redis\nfrom redis.exceptions import ResponseError\n\nfrom mini_celery.broker.base import Broker\nfrom mini_celery.config import Settings, get_settings\n\n\nclass RedisStreamsBroker(Broker):\n    def __init__(self, settings: Settings | None = None, redis_client: Redis | None = None):\n        self.settings = settings or get_settings()\n        self.redis: Redis = redis_client or Redis.from_url(\n            self.settings.redis_url,\n            decode_responses=True,\n        )\n\n    def _stream(self, queue: str) -> str:\n        return self.settings.stream_name(queue)\n\n    async def ensure_consumer_group(self, queue: str) -> None:\n        stream = self._stream(queue)\n        try:\n            await self.redis.xgroup_create(\n                name=stream,\n                groupname=self.settings.consumer_group,\n                id=\"0\",\n                mkstream=True,\n            )\n        except ResponseError as exc:\n            if \"BUSYGROUP\" not in str(exc):\n                raise\n\n    async def enqueue(self, queue: str, fields: Mapping[str, str]) -> str:\n        await self.ensure_consumer_group(queue)\n        stream = self._stream(queue)\n        return await self.redis.xadd(stream, fields)  # type: ignore[return-value]\n\n    async def read_group(\n        self,\n        queue: str,\n        consumer: str,\n        count: int,\n        block_ms: int,\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, dict[str, str]]]:\n        await self.ensure_consumer_group(queue)\n        stream = self._stream(queue)\n        response = await self.redis.xreadgroup(\n            groupname=self.settings.consumer_group,\n            consumername=consumer,\n            streams={stream: \">\"},\n            count=count,\n            block=block_ms,\n        )\n        results: list[tuple[str, dict[str, str]]] = []\n        for _, entries in response:\n            for stream_id, fields in entries:\n                normalized = {str(k): str(v) for k, v in fields.items()}\n                results.append((stream_id, normalized))\n        return results\n\n    async def ack(self, queue: str, stream_id: str) -> int:\n        stream = self._stream(queue)\n        return await self.redis.xack(stream, self.settings.consumer_group, stream_id)\n\n    async def claim_stale(\n        self,\n        queue: str,\n        consumer: str,\n        min_idle_ms: int,\n        count: int,\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, dict[str, str]]]:\n        stream = self._stream(queue)\n        await self.ensure_consumer_group(queue)\n\n        pending = await self.redis.xpending_range(\n            name=stream,\n            groupname=self.settings.consumer_group,\n            min=\"-\",\n            max=\"+\",\n            count=count,\n            idle=min_idle_ms,\n        )\n        if not pending:\n            return []\n\n        message_ids = [item[\"message_id\"] for item in pending]\n        claimed = await self.redis.xclaim(\n            name=stream,\n            groupname=self.settings.consumer_group,\n            consumername=consumer,\n            min_idle_time=min_idle_ms,\n            message_ids=message_ids,\n        )\n\n        results: list[tuple[str, dict[str, str]]] = []\n        for stream_id, fields in claimed:\n            normalized = {str(k): str(v) for k, v in fields.items()}\n            results.append((stream_id, normalized))\n        return results\n\n    async def queue_depth(self, queue: str) -> int:\n        stream = self._stream(queue)\n        return await self.redis.xlen(stream)\n\n    async def publish_dlq(self, fields: Mapping[str, str]) -> str:\n        return await self.redis.xadd(self.settings.dlq_stream_name, fields)  # type: ignore[return-value]\n\n    async def ping(self) -> bool:\n        response = await self.redis.ping()\n        return bool(response)\n\n    async def close(self) -> None:\n        await self.redis.aclose()\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "e9d134b71790c367b2b51454c2688da44213667eb44cab7ce7866ea68ebec5e2",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"

          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\nfrom uuid import UUID\n\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict, Field\n\nfrom mini_celery.models import Job, JobEvent, JobState\n\n\nclass CreateJobRequest(BaseModel):\n    type: str\n    payload: dict[str, Any]\n    queue: str = \"default\"\n    max_attempts: int = Field(default=3, ge=1, le=100)\n    run_at: datetime | None = None\n    idempotency_key: str | None = Field(default=None, max_length=200)\n\n\nclass CreateJobResponse(BaseModel):\n    job_id: UUID\n\n\nclass JobResponse(BaseModel):\n    model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)\n\n    id: UUID\n    type: str\n    payload: dict[str, Any]\n    state: JobState\n    created_at: datetime\n    updated_at: datetime\n    idempotency_key: str | None = None\n    attempts: int\n    max_attempts: int\n    next_run_at: datetime | None = None\n    schedule: str | None = None\n    last_error: str | None = None\n    result: dict[str, Any] | None = None\n    queue: str\n    cancel_requested: bool\n    lease_expires_at: datetime | None = None\n    last_stream_id: str | None = None\n    enqueued: bool\n    version: int\n\n\nclass JobEventResponse(BaseModel):\n    model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)\n\n    id: int\n    job_id: UUID\n    ts: datetime\n    old_state: str | None\n    new_state: str\n    message: str\n    metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None\n\n\nclass JobsListResponse(BaseModel):\n    items: list[JobResponse]\n    next_cursor: str | None = None\n\n\nclass JobEventsListResponse(BaseModel):\n    items: list[JobEventResponse]\n    next_cursor_ts: datetime | None = None\n\n\nclass ActionJobResponse(BaseModel):\n    job: JobResponse\n\n\ndef job_to_response(job: Job) -> JobResponse:\n    return JobResponse.model_validate(job)\n\n\ndef jobs_to_response(jobs: list[Job]) -> list[JobResponse]:\n    return [job_to_response(job) for job in jobs]\n\n\ndef events_to_response(events: list[JobEvent]) -> list[JobEventResponse]:\n    return [JobEventResponse.model_validate(event) for event in events]\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "0d01d7896dbdff39a77b031255f1f047a9590de55dd09e8d0dcdd267e6a0fabe",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },

          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"

      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom collections.abc import Mapping\nfrom typing import Protocol\n\n\nclass BrokerMessage(Protocol):\n    stream_id: str\n    queue: str\n    fields: dict[str, str]\n\n\nclass Broker(Protocol):\n    async def ensure_consumer_group(self, queue: str) -> None: ...\n\n    async def enqueue(self, queue: str, fields: Mapping[str, str]) -> str: ...\n\n    async def read_group(\n        self,\n        queue: str,\n        consumer: str,\n        count: int,\n        block_ms: int,\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, dict[str, str]]]: ...\n\n    async def ack(self, queue: str, stream_id: str) -> int: ...\n\n    async def claim_stale(\n        self,\n        queue: str,\n        consumer: str,\n        min_idle_ms: int,\n        count: int,\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, dict[str, str]]]: ...\n\n    async def queue_depth(self, queue: str) -> int: ...\n\n    async def publish_dlq(self, fields: Mapping[str, str]) -> str: ...\n\n    async def ping(self) -> bool: ...\n\n    async def close(self) -> None: ...\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "e30af2c2ff6b68bc15fa0346bf02ac90654a3ddd53a358794d85bd1f1f773129",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom enum import Enum\nfrom typing import Any\nfrom uuid import uuid4\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import Boolean, DateTime, Integer, JSON, String, Text, UniqueConstraint\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import DeclarativeBase, Mapped, mapped_column\n\n\nclass Base(DeclarativeBase):\n    pass\n\n\nclass JobState(str, Enum):\n    QUEUED = \"QUEUED\"\n    RUNNING = \"RUNNING\"\n    SUCCEEDED = \"SUCCEEDED\"\n    FAILED = \"FAILED\"\n    CANCELED = \"CANCELED\"\n    DEAD = \"DEAD\"\n\n\nTERMINAL_STATES: set[JobState] = {\n    JobState.SUCCEEDED,\n    JobState.FAILED,\n    JobState.CANCELED,\n    JobState.DEAD,\n}\n\n\nclass IdempotencyStatus(str, Enum):\n    IN_PROGRESS = \"IN_PROGRESS\"\n    SUCCEEDED = \"SUCCEEDED\"\n\n\ndef utc_now() -> datetime:\n    return datetime.now(UTC)\n\n\nclass Job(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"jobs\"\n\n    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid4()))\n    type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), index=True)\n    payload: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON)\n    state: Mapped[JobState] = mapped_column(String(20), index=True)\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), default=utc_now, index=True)\n    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), default=utc_now, onupdate=utc_now)\n\n    idempotency_key: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(200), nullable=True, index=True)\n    attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=0)\n    max_attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=3)\n\n    next_run_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True, index=True)\n    schedule: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(200), nullable=True)\n\n    last_error: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\n    result: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=True)\n\n    queue: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), default=\"default\", index=True)\n    cancel_requested: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False)\n    lease_expires_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True)\n    last_stream_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=True)\n    enqueued: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False, index=True)\n    version: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=0)\n\n\nclass JobEvent(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"job_events\"\n\n    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)\n    job_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), index=True)\n    ts: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), default=utc_now, index=True)\n    old_state: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(20), nullable=True)\n    new_state: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(20))\n    message: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text)\n    metadata: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=True)\n\n\nclass IdempotencyLock(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"idempotency_locks\"\n\n    key: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(200), primary_key=True)\n    owner_job_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), index=True)\n    status: Mapped[IdempotencyStatus] = mapped_column(String(20), default=IdempotencyStatus.IN_PROGRESS)\n    result: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=True)\n    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), default=utc_now, onupdate=utc_now)\n\n\nclass ScheduleTick(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"schedule_ticks\"\n    __table_args__ = (\n        UniqueConstraint(\"schedule_id\", \"planned_time\", name=\"uq_schedule_tick\"),\n    )\n\n    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)\n    schedule_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(200), index=True)\n    planned_time: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), index=True)\n    job_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(36), nullable=True)\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), default=utc_now)\r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "28a97d5c4afcefd8f7a6a0d837aa68588a3157a4b6271db184d8618b10051f96",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

Date: Thu\, 05 Mar 2026 04:02:39 GMT

annotations\n\nimport asyncio\nfrom collections.abc import Awaitable, Callable\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\nfrom typing import Any\n\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, ValidationError\n\nfrom mini_celery.backoff import BackoffPolicy\n\n\nclass TaskExecutionError(Exception):\n    def __init__(self, message: str, retryable: bool):\n        super().__init__(message)\n        self.retryable = retryable\n\n\nclass RetryableTaskError(TaskExecutionError):\n    def __init__(self, message: str):\n        super().__init__(message, retryable=True)\n\n\nclass FatalTaskError(TaskExecutionError):\n    def __init__(self, message: str):\n        super().__init__(message, retryable=False)\n\n\nclass JobCancelledError(TaskExecutionError):\n    def __init__(self, message: str = \"job canceled\"):\n        super().__init__(message, retryable=False)\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass TaskContext:\n    job_id: str\n    attempt: int\n    should_cancel: Callable[[], bool]\n\n    async def checkpoint(self) -> None:\n        if self.should_cancel():\n            raise JobCancelledError()\n        await asyncio.sleep(0)\n\n\nTaskHandler = Callable[[TaskContext, BaseModel], Awaitable[dict[str, Any] | None]]\n\n\n@dataclass(slots=True)\nclass TaskSpec:\n    name: str\n    payload_model: type[BaseModel]\n    handler: TaskHandler\n    backoff_policy: BackoffPolicy\n\n\nclass TaskRegistry:\n    def __init__(self) -> None:\n        self._tasks: dict[str, TaskSpec] = {}\n\n    def register(self, spec: TaskSpec) -> None:\n        if spec.name in self._tasks:\n            raise ValueError(f\"Task type already registered: {spec.name}\")\n        self._tasks[spec.name] = spec\n\n    def get(self, task_type: str) -> TaskSpec:\n        try:\n            return self._tasks[task_type]\n        except KeyError as exc:\n            raise FatalTaskError(f\"Unknown task type: {task_type}\") from exc\n\n    async def execute(\n        self,\n        task_type: str,\n        payload: dict[str, Any],\n        context: TaskContext,\n    ) -> dict[str, Any] | None:\n        spec = self.get(task_type)\n        try:\n            validated = spec.payload_model.model_validate(payload)\n        except ValidationError as exc:\n            raise FatalTaskError(f\"Invalid payload for {task_type}: {exc}\") from exc\n\n        return await spec.handler(context, validated)\n\n    def backoff_for(self, task_type: str) -> BackoffPolicy:\n        return self.get(task_type).backoff_policy\n\n    def names(self) -> list[str]:\n        return sorted(self._tasks.keys())\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "74b07d702dc985c7ba3b4b73584a160d4d7e20d3b7cd7485f1891c80f77def68", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom dataclasses import dataclass\n\nfrom mini_celery.models import JobState\n\n\nclass InvalidTransition(ValueError):\n    pass\n\n\nALLOWED_TRANSITIONS: dict[JobState, set[JobState]] = {\n    JobState.QUEUED: {JobState.RUNNING, JobState.CANCELED},\n    JobState.RUNNING: {\n        JobState.SUCCEEDED,\n        JobState.FAILED,\n        JobState.CANCELED,\n        JobState.DEAD,\n        JobState.QUEUED,\n    },\n    JobState.FAILED: {JobState.QUEUED},\n    JobState.DEAD: {JobState.QUEUED},\n    JobState.SUCCEEDED: set(),\n    JobState.CANCELED: set(),\n}\n\n\n@dataclass(frozen=True)\nclass Transition:\n    old: JobState\n    new: JobState\n\n\ndef can_transition(old: JobState, new: JobState) -> bool:\n    return new in ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS.get(old, set())\n\n\ndef assert_transition(old: JobState, new: JobState) -> None:\n    if not can_transition(old, new):\n        raise InvalidTransition(f\"Invalid transition: {old} -> {new}\")\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "ff810ee4f83244f1cf789694704b84c8a368e47616eb132278c054d28fafae2d", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom collections.abc import Mapping\n\nfrom redis.asyncio import Redis\nfrom redis.exceptions import ResponseError\n\nfrom mini_celery.broker.base import Broker\nfrom mini_celery.config import Settings, get_settings\n\n\nclass RedisStreamsBroker(Broker):\n    def __init__(self, settings: Settings | None = None, redis_client: Redis | None = None):\n        self.settings = settings or get_settings()\n        self.redis: Redis = redis_client or Redis.from_url(\n            self.settings.redis_url,\n            decode_responses=True,\n        )\n\n    def _stream(self, queue: str) -> str:\n        return self.settings.stream_name(queue)\n\n    async def ensure_consumer_group(self, queue: str) -> None:\n        stream = self._stream(queue)\n        try:\n            await self.redis.xgroup_create(\n                name=stream,\n                groupname=self.settings.consumer_group,\n                id=\"0\",\n                mkstream=True,\n            )\n        except ResponseError as exc:\n            if \"BUSYGROUP\" not in str(exc):\n                raise\n\n    async def enqueue(self, queue: str, fields: Mapping[str, str]) -> str:\n        await self.ensure_consumer_group(queue)\n        stream = self._stream(queue)\n        return await self.redis.xadd(stream, fields)  # type: ignore[return-value]\n\n    async def read_group(\n        self,\n        queue: str,\n        consumer: str,\n        count: int,\n        block_ms: int,\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, dict[str, str]]]:\n        await self.ensure_consumer_group(queue)\n        stream = self._stream(queue)\n        response = await self.redis.xreadgroup(\n            groupname=self.settings.consumer_group,\n            consumername=consumer,\n            streams={stream: \">\"},\n            count=count,\n            block=block_ms,\n        )\n        results: list[tuple[str, dict[str, str]]] = []\n        for _, entries in response:\n            for stream_id, fields in entries:\n                normalized = {str(k): str(v) for k, v in fields.items()}\n                results.append((stream_id, normalized))\n        return results\n\n    async def ack(self, queue: str, stream_id: str) -> int:\n        stream = self._stream(queue)\n        return await self.redis.xack(stream, self.settings.consumer_group, stream_id)\n\n    async def claim_stale(\n        self,\n        queue: str,\n        consumer: str,\n        min_idle_ms: int,\n        count: int,\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, dict[str, str]]]:\n        stream = self._stream(queue)\n        await self.ensure_consumer_group(queue)\n\n        pending = await self.redis.xpending_range(\n            name=stream,\n            groupname=self.settings.consumer_group,\n            min=\"-\",\n            max=\"+\",\n            count=count,\n            idle=min_idle_ms,\n        )\n        if not pending:\n            return []\n\n        message_ids = [item[\"message_id\"] for item in pending]\n        claimed = await self.redis.xclaim(\n            name=stream,\n            groupname=self.settings.consumer_group,\n            consumername=consumer,\n            min_idle_time=min_idle_ms,\n            message_ids=message_ids,\n        )\n\n        results: list[tuple[str, dict[str, str]]] = []\n        for stream_id, fields in claimed:\n            normalized = {str(k): str(v) for k, v in fields.items()}\n            results.append((stream_id, normalized))\n        return results\n\n    async def queue_depth(self, queue: str) -> int:\n        stream = self._stream(queue)\n        return await self.redis.xlen(stream)\n\n    async def publish_dlq(self, fields: Mapping[str, str]) -> str:\n        return await self.redis.xadd(self.settings.dlq_stream_name, fields)  # type: ignore[return-value]\n\n    async def ping(self) -> bool:\n        response = await self.redis.ping()\n        return bool(response)\n\n    async def close(self) -> None:\n        await self.redis.aclose()\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "e9d134b71790c367b2b51454c2688da44213667eb44cab7ce7866ea68ebec5e2", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom typing import Any\nfrom uuid import UUID\n\nfrom pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict, Field\n\nfrom mini_celery.models import Job, JobEvent, JobState\n\n\nclass CreateJobRequest(BaseModel):\n    type: str\n    payload: dict[str, Any]\n    queue: str = \"default\"\n    max_attempts: int = Field(default=3, ge=1, le=100)\n    run_at: datetime | None = None\n    idempotency_key: str | None = Field(default=None, max_length=200)\n\n\nclass CreateJobResponse(BaseModel):\n    job_id: UUID\n\n\nclass JobResponse(BaseModel):\n    model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)\n\n    id: UUID\n    type: str\n    payload: dict[str, Any]\n    state: JobState\n    created_at: datetime\n    updated_at: datetime\n    idempotency_key: str | None = None\n    attempts: int\n    max_attempts: int\n    next_run_at: datetime | None = None\n    schedule: str | None = None\n    last_error: str | None = None\n    result: dict[str, Any] | None = None\n    queue: str\n    cancel_requested: bool\n    lease_expires_at: datetime | None = None\n    last_stream_id: str | None = None\n    enqueued: bool\n    version: int\n\n\nclass JobEventResponse(BaseModel):\n    model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)\n\n    id: int\n    job_id: UUID\n    ts: datetime\n    old_state: str | None\n    new_state: str\n    message: str\n    metadata: dict[str, Any] | None = None\n\n\nclass JobsListResponse(BaseModel):\n    items: list[JobResponse]\n    next_cursor: str | None = None\n\n\nclass JobEventsListResponse(BaseModel):\n    items: list[JobEventResponse]\n    next_cursor_ts: datetime | None = None\n\n\nclass ActionJobResponse(BaseModel):\n    job: JobResponse\n\n\ndef job_to_response(job: Job) -> JobResponse:\n    return JobResponse.model_validate(job)\n\n\ndef jobs_to_response(jobs: list[Job]) -> list[JobResponse]:\n    return [job_to_response(job) for job in jobs]\n\n\ndef events_to_response(events: list[JobEvent]) -> list[JobEventResponse]:\n    return [JobEventResponse.model_validate(event) for event in events]\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "0d01d7896dbdff39a77b031255f1f047a9590de55dd09e8d0dcdd267e6a0fabe", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom collections.abc import Mapping\nfrom typing import Protocol\n\n\nclass BrokerMessage(Protocol):\n    stream_id: str\n    queue: str\n    fields: dict[str, str]\n\n\nclass Broker(Protocol):\n    async def ensure_consumer_group(self, queue: str) -> None: ...\n\n    async def enqueue(self, queue: str, fields: Mapping[str, str]) -> str: ...\n\n    async def read_group(\n        self,\n        queue: str,\n        consumer: str,\n        count: int,\n        block_ms: int,\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, dict[str, str]]]: ...\n\n    async def ack(self, queue: str, stream_id: str) -> int: ...\n\n    async def claim_stale(\n        self,\n        queue: str,\n        consumer: str,\n        min_idle_ms: int,\n        count: int,\n    ) -> list[tuple[str, dict[str, str]]]: ...\n\n    async def queue_depth(self, queue: str) -> int: ...\n\n    async def publish_dlq(self, fields: Mapping[str, str]) -> str: ...\n\n    async def ping(self) -> bool: ...\n\n    async def close(self) -> None: ...\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "e30af2c2ff6b68bc15fa0346bf02ac90654a3ddd53a358794d85bd1f1f773129", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": "from __future__ import annotations\n\nfrom datetime import UTC, datetime\nfrom enum import Enum\nfrom typing import Any\nfrom uuid import uuid4\n\nfrom sqlalchemy import Boolean, DateTime, Integer, JSON, String, Text, UniqueConstraint\nfrom sqlalchemy.orm import DeclarativeBase, Mapped, mapped_column\n\n\nclass Base(DeclarativeBase):\n    pass\n\n\nclass JobState(str, Enum):\n    QUEUED = \"QUEUED\"\n    RUNNING = \"RUNNING\"\n    SUCCEEDED = \"SUCCEEDED\"\n    FAILED = \"FAILED\"\n    CANCELED = \"CANCELED\"\n    DEAD = \"DEAD\"\n\n\nTERMINAL_STATES: set[JobState] = {\n    JobState.SUCCEEDED,\n    JobState.FAILED,\n    JobState.CANCELED,\n    JobState.DEAD,\n}\n\n\nclass IdempotencyStatus(str, Enum):\n    IN_PROGRESS = \"IN_PROGRESS\"\n    SUCCEEDED = \"SUCCEEDED\"\n\n\ndef utc_now() -> datetime:\n    return datetime.now(UTC)\n\n\nclass Job(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"jobs\"\n\n    id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), primary_key=True, default=lambda: str(uuid4()))\n    type: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), index=True)\n    payload: Mapped[dict[str, Any]] = mapped_column(JSON)\n    state: Mapped[JobState] = mapped_column(String(20), index=True)\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), default=utc_now, index=True)\n    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), default=utc_now, onupdate=utc_now)\n\n    idempotency_key: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(200), nullable=True, index=True)\n    attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=0)\n    max_attempts: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=3)\n\n    next_run_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True, index=True)\n    schedule: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(200), nullable=True)\n\n    last_error: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(Text, nullable=True)\n    result: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=True)\n\n    queue: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(100), default=\"default\", index=True)\n    cancel_requested: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False)\n    lease_expires_at: Mapped[datetime | None] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), nullable=True)\n    last_stream_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(64), nullable=True)\n    enqueued: Mapped[bool] = mapped_column(Boolean, default=False, index=True)\n    version: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, default=0)\n\n\nclass JobEvent(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"job_events\"\n\n    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)\n    job_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), index=True)\n    ts: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), default=utc_now, index=True)\n    old_state: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(20), nullable=True)\n    new_state: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(20))\n    message: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(Text)\n    metadata: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=True)\n\n\nclass IdempotencyLock(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"idempotency_locks\"\n\n    key: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(200), primary_key=True)\n    owner_job_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(36), index=True)\n    status: Mapped[IdempotencyStatus] = mapped_column(String(20), default=IdempotencyStatus.IN_PROGRESS)\n    result: Mapped[dict[str, Any] | None] = mapped_column(JSON, nullable=True)\n    updated_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), default=utc_now, onupdate=utc_now)\n\n\nclass ScheduleTick(Base):\n    __tablename__ = \"schedule_ticks\"\n    __table_args__ = (\n        UniqueConstraint(\"schedule_id\", \"planned_time\", name=\"uq_schedule_tick\"),\n    )\n\n    id: Mapped[int] = mapped_column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)\n    schedule_id: Mapped[str] = mapped_column(String(200), index=True)\n    planned_time: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), index=True)\n    job_id: Mapped[str | None] = mapped_column(String(36), nullable=True)\n    created_at: Mapped[datetime] = mapped_column(DateTime(timezone=True), default=utc_now)\r\n"}, "2:LEN": "28a97d5c4afcefd8f7a6a0d837aa68588a3157a4b6271db184d8618b10051f96", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}]}
http:url is /aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2
